name: CVE-2026-42089

name: CVE-2026-34207
description: The SSRF filter checked hostname text, but the actual destination was decided later by DNS. That gap let attacker-controlled Webhook URLs reach loopback, metadata, and private network targets.

name: CVE-2026-34212

name: CVE-2026-33146
description: A public share looked clean in the page tree, but the search endpoint told a different story. In Docmost, restricted child pages hidden from public share viewers could still leak through public share search results.
